read-pdf-metadata-using-pdffileinfo.title: Read PDF Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-metadata-using-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and retrieve common metadata properties such as title, author, creation date, and PDF version.

read-pdf-author-metadata.title: Read PDF Author Metadata
read-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read the Author metadata property from a PDF file and print it to the console.

read-pdf-title-metadata.title: Read PDF Title Metadata and Write to Log
read-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, retrieve the Title metadata, and append it to a log file.

retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Retrieve PDF Keywords Metadata with PdfFileInfo
retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and read the Keywords metadata property, handling missing files gracefully.

read-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Read PDF Creator Metadata with PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to open a PDF file and retrieve its Creator metadata property.

read-pdf-modification-date.title: Read PDF Modification Date Using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-modification-date.description: Shows how to extract the ModDate metadata from a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and output it in a readable date format.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Author metadata of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the changes to a new file.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata with PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Title property of a PDF using the PdfFileInfo facade and persist the change to a new file with SaveNewInfo.

set-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Set PDF Keywords Metadata with PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign the Keywords metadata field of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, save the updated document to a new file, and verify the change.

set-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata with PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom Creator value to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the change with SaveNewInfo.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF using PdfFileInfo
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata entry to a PDF file with the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated document.

retrieve-projectcode-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom Metadata "ProjectCode" from PDF
retrieve-projectcode-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileInfo facade to read a custom metadata entry named "ProjectCode" from a PDF file and display its value.

add-reviewedby-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata Field "ReviewedBy" to PDF
add-reviewedby-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with PdfFileInfo, set a custom metadata entry, and save the updated document to a new file.

retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom "ReviewedBy" Metadata from PDF
retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.description: Shows how to read a custom metadata property called "ReviewedBy" from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

add-custom-metadata-field-to-pdfs.title: Add Custom Metadata Field to PDFs Using PdfFileInfo
add-custom-metadata-field-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files, set a custom metadata entry named "Department" with PdfFileInfo, and save the updated PDFs to a new folder.

add-or-update-custom-pdf-metadata.title: Add or Update Custom PDF Metadata While Preserving Existing Info
add-or-update-custom-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to add or update a custom metadata field (Version) without affecting other metadata, and save the changes to a new PDF file.

clear-custom-pdf-metadata-field.title: Clear Custom PDF Metadata Field
clear-custom-pdf-metadata-field.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific custom metadata entry from a PDF by setting its value to an empty string using the PdfFileInfo facade and saving the updated document.

read-custom-pdf-metadata-key.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata Key
read-custom-pdf-metadata-key.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileInfo facade to check for a custom metadata key ("Confidential") in a PDF and read its value if it exists.

add-lastupdated-timestamp-metadata.title: Add LastUpdated Timestamp Metadata to PDF
add-lastupdated-timestamp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata field containing the current UTC timestamp to a PDF using the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated document.

update-pdf-metadata-save-new-file.title: Update PDF Metadata and Save to New File
update-pdf-metadata-save-new-file.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfFileInfo, modify its metadata (title, author, subject, keywords) and write the updated information to a new PDF using SaveNewInfo.

dispose-pdffileinfo-and-document-using-b.title: Dispose PdfFileInfo and Document Using Blocks
dispose-pdffileinfo-and-document-using-b.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, then using PdfFileInfo and Document inside using statements to automatically dispose unmanaged resources while adding a page and saving the file.

backup-pdfs-update-metadata.title: Backup PDFs and Update Metadata with PdfFileInfo
backup-pdfs-update-metadata.description: Creates a backup copy of each PDF in a source folder and then uses the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo facade to modify the title, author, subject and keywords of the original file.

update-pdf-metadata-audit.title: Update PDF Metadata and Log Changes to CSV
update-pdf-metadata-audit.description: Shows how to read existing PDF metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, modify the values, save the updated PDF, and write an audit CSV containing original and new metadata values.

update-pdf-metadata-readonly-handling.title: Update PDF Metadata with Read‑Only File Handling
update-pdf-metadata-readonly-handling.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and gracefully handle an IOException caused by a read‑only output file by clearing the attribute and retrying.

update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.title: Update PDF Metadata Using MemoryStream
update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF into a MemoryStream, modifying its metadata with PdfFileInfo, and saving the updated document to a new file.

update-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Update PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF as a stream, modify its Keywords metadata with PdfFileInfo, and save the updated document to a new file.

update-pdf-author-metadata-conditionally.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Conditionally
update-pdf-author-metadata-conditionally.description: Shows how to read a PDF's metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, check if the Author field is empty, set a default author, and save the updated metadata to a new file.

retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetica.title: Retrieve and Display All Custom PDF Metadata Alphabetically
retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetica.description: The example shows how to obtain all custom metadata keys from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, sort them alphabetically, and print each key with its value via GetMetaInfo.

merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdffileinfo.title: Merge XMP Metadata with PdfFileInfo
merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to combine standard PdfFileInfo properties with an XMP metadata packet and save the merged information into a new PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-version.title: Read PDF Version Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
read-pdf-version.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to retrieve the PDF version string from a file and store it for later use.

export-pdf-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-metadata-to-json.description: Shows how to read metadata from each PDF file in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and serialize the collected information into a JSON file for external processing.

import-json-metadata-to-pdf.title: Import JSON Metadata and Apply to PDFs using PdfFileInfo
import-json-metadata-to-pdf.description: The example reads a JSON file containing metadata records, deserializes them, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to update standard and custom PDF metadata, saving the result to a new or original file.

apply-metadata-updates-to-multiple-pdfs-.title: Apply Metadata Updates to Multiple PDFs in Parallel
apply-metadata-updates-to-multiple-pdfs-.description: Demonstrates how to update author, title, and subject metadata for a batch of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and the Task Parallel Library.

thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Metadata Update with PdfFileInfo
thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.description: Demonstrates how to safely modify PDF metadata concurrently by creating a separate PdfFileInfo instance per thread and saving the changes to new files.

validate-pdf-metadata-with-regex.title: Validate and Set PDF Metadata with Regex
validate-pdf-metadata-with-regex.description: Demonstrates how to validate PDF metadata strings using a regular expression before assigning them via the PdfFileInfo facade and saving the updated PDF.

read-custom-pdf-metadata.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata with Null Handling
read-custom-pdf-metadata.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read custom metadata keys from a PDF and gracefully handle missing or empty values.

update-pdf-subject-metadata.title: Update PDF Subject Metadata using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-subject-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfFileInfo, modify its Subject metadata, and save the updated document to a new file.

set-pdf-language-property.title: Set PDF Language Property Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-language-property.description: Shows how to set the document language (Lang entry) of a PDF via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the modified file.

set-pdfa-compliance-flag-with-pdffileinf.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A and Save with PdfFileInfo
set-pdfa-compliance-flag-with-pdffileinf.description: The example loads a PDF, converts it to PDF/A if it is not already compliant, and then uses the PdfFileInfo facade to write the updated PDF/A document to a new file, ensuring archival compliance.

set-pdf-document-id-with-guid.title: Set PDF Document ID with GUID
set-pdf-document-id-with-guid.description: Demonstrates how to generate a GUID and store it as a custom Document ID in a PDF's metadata using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade.
